text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is a chance for racers to improve
their skills. Curren Chan and I are on the bus
heading toward the campground, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Nah, just checking it. Sometimes my old posts get
new comments!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having learned something new, I decide to copy
her and look at some of her old posts as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, Curren Chan's Umastagram shows her
cute and sparkly everyday life.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I bet I can get some pics with a totally new vibe at
summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Lemme know right away if you have any ideas! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Lemme know right away if you have any ideas! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A lot of runners really push themselves hard
during summer camp. As for which parts of that
you can capture...
choice_data_list: Maybe a video of you training or something?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I dunno. It's a bit hard to control the shot
while I'm training.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm always suuuuper picky about what I post. I
only use the best and the cutest!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I really concentrate while taking them too. I
wanna focus on training, so I think I should stay
away from any vids for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think Curren Chan's already plenty cute while
she's training, but I'm sure she has incredibly high
standards.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The beach is the perfect location for photos, so
I'm gonna make sure to make as much content as I
can during breaks. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And don't you miss any opportunities to get a
good action shot either, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And don't you miss any opportunities to get a
good action shot either, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like this is shaping up to be a really cute,
and possibly hot, summer camp.
